recommendations.title: You've Got Mail
recommendations.overview: Book superstore magnate Joe Fox and independent book shop owner Kathleen Kelly fall in love in the anonymity of the Internet—both blissfully unaware that he's trying to put her out of business.

recommendations.title: About Last Night...
recommendations.overview: A man and woman meet and try to have a romantic affair, despite their personal problems and the interference of their disapproving friends.

recommendations.title: Noel
recommendations.overview: With Christmas Eve just around the corner in bustling New York, five lonely and sad strangers find their lives inadvertently intersected.

recommendations.title: Blonde Ambition
recommendations.overview: A young professional woman unwittingly becomes the pawn of two business executives in their bid to oust the head of a mega-conglomerate.

recommendations.title: Waiting for Forever
recommendations.overview: A Hollywood-set romantic tale of a guy who is content to live his life without a job yet with the love of his life, a young actress.

recommendations.title: Jane Austen Wrecked My Life
recommendations.overview: An aspiring author looking to get more out of life takes up a writing residency and finds herself in the sort of romantic entanglements that could come from the pages of a Jane Austen novel.

recommendations.title: Ready to Mingle
recommendations.overview: A wannabe bride seeks professional help to find a husband and in the process finds herself.

recommendations.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
recommendations.overview: Shruti and Bittoo decide to start a wedding planning company together after they graduate from university, but romance gets in the way of business.

recommendations.title: Prime
recommendations.overview: A career driven professional from Manhattan is wooed by a young painter, who also happens to be the son of her psychoanalyst.

recommendations.title: The Duchess
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of 18th century aristocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, who was reviled for her extravagant political and personal life.
